brand.name: SwarmOS
brand.description: AI SaaS platform for automated SDR outreach and meeting booking

spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 md:gap-8
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense text and forms. Center-align hero headlines.

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-800 transition-colors px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black border border-gray-200 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.ghost: text-gray-600 hover:text-black hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl transition-colors px-4 py-2

cards.default: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm p-6
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md transition-all cursor-pointer

inputs.default: w-full border border-gray-300 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-base focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black focus:border-transparent transition-shadow
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-200 z-50
navigation.sidebar: h-screen bg-gray-50 border-r border-gray-200 flex flex-col w-64 p-4

data_display.kpi_card: flex flex-col gap-2 p-6 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl

hero_background.description: Abstract grey and white tech background. Use with low opacity (e.g., opacity-30) behind the hero section.

feature_image.description: Metal structure abstract pattern. Good for bento grid feature cards representing robust infrastructure.

avatars.description: Male avatar for activity feed or topbar profile

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML tags and Tailwind CSS for the Landing Page layout to maintain maximum flexibility, utilizing bento grids where appropriate.
For the Onboarding Wizard and Dashboard, use Shadcn/UI components (cards, inputs, dropdowns) heavily customized to match the high-contrast, rounded-xl theme.
Ensure the application strictly uses the provided black/white contrast theme, avoiding 'SaaS Blue' or overused gradients.
All navigation and layout must be responsive (mobile-first), keeping grids 1-column on mobile and expanding on md/lg viewports.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Add these to the HTML head via Google Fonts.
Every interactive element (buttons, forms, links) MUST have a semantic data-testid attribute for testing purposes.
The Onboarding Wizard should consist of 4 distinct steps visually tracked by a progress bar or step indicator.
The Dashboard must feature a prominent Topbar and Sidebar, prioritizing utility and data legibility over decorative elements.
